query:
SELECT id, productName, wholesaleCost, defaultRetailPrice, notes
FROM supplier_product_cost_map
WHERE supplier = 'SasBoss'
AND (
  productName LIKE '%Collaborate%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Common Phone%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Lite User%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Essential User%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Basic User%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Premium%' OR
  productName LIKE '%UCXcel%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Virtual Park%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Voicemail User%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Microsoft Teams%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Residential%' OR
  productName LIKE '%SIP Trunk%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Business Trunk%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Executive User%' OR
  productName LIKE '%SmileTel%'
)
ORDER BY productName;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT id, productName, wholesaleCost, defaultRetailPrice, notes
FROM supplier_product_cost_map
WHERE supplier = 'SasBoss'
AND (
  productName LIKE '%Collaborate%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Common Phone%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Lite User%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Essential User%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Basic User%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Premium%' OR
  productName LIKE '%UCXcel%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Virtual Park%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Voicemail User%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Microsoft Teams%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Residential%' OR
  productName LIKE '%SIP Trunk%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Business Trunk%' OR
  productName LIKE '%Executive User%' OR
  productName LIKE '%SmileTel%'
)
ORDER BY productName;
